meta.truth_model: Task 16 inventory snapshot: source-backed parity inventory remains contextual evidence and may still record broader repo gaps outside the enforced regression suite.

config_meta.env_key_strategy: AXONHUB_ + uppercase dotted key with dots replaced by underscores
